description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ribbing around neckline, slight fading on the seams to give a washed denim look and with graphic on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in warm water with like colors Use non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry on low Do not iron or dry clean Let the world know that batman is back and here to stay with this black t-shirt brought to you by bioworld. The batman graphic on the front exudes power and the distressed look on the seams gives this tee an edgy look. Team it with jeans and casual black leather shoes for a bad boy look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
